summary: Good recording with a memorable Phil Lesh‑driven Box of Rain moment
review: The sole reviewer highlights an intimate floor experience where the crowd spurred Phil Lesh into a standout performance of "Box of Rain," calling it one of the coolest moments in their 74‑show history. No details on the tape source or sound quality are given, so the recording is assumed to be listenable but uncharacterized.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑to‑high rating (4 stars) focuses on a strong musical moment; no recording‑quality commentary to boost the score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer notes a special crowd‑driven moment with Phil Lesh leading into Box of Rain; overall set impression not detailed.

band_member_comments.Phil: Crowd goaded Phil and he delivered an exceptional Box of Rain, earning the nickname "wisenheimers" from him.
